name: world_reader_consumer
notes: Single-tick slice of the consumer FSM. state=CWait, world.n=7 => state_next=CFormat (world.n>0 branch), effects=[IntToStr(7)]. last_results is empty; n_str='?' via the fallback arm, but n_str is only used in CFormat branch which is not active this tick.
